pokemon:yanmega.name: Yanmega
pokemon:yanmega.summary: This six-legged Pokémon is easily capable of transporting an adult in flight. The wings on its tail help it stay balanced.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This six-legged Pokémon is easily capable of transporting an adult in flight. The wings on its tail help it stay balanced.
Its jaw power is incredible. It is adept at biting apart foes while flying by at high speed.
It prefers to battle by biting apart foes’ heads instantly while flying by at high speed.
By churning its wings, it creates shock waves that inflict critical internal injuries to foes.
This six-legged Pokémon is easily capable of transporting an adult in flight. The wings on its tail help it stay balanced.
Extremely violent. When hunting, it wastes none of its energy, aiming only for prey's most vulnerable spots. Any who manage to tame this Pokémon must be of incredible bravery.
It prefers to battle by biting apart foes’ heads instantly while flying by at high speed.
By churning its wings, it creates shock waves that inflict critical internal injuries to foes.
Its jaw power is incredible. It is adept at biting apart foes while flying by at high speed.
The beat of its wings is so powerful that it accidentally dislodges full-grown trees when it takes off in flight.
Its jaw power is incredible. It is adept at biting apart foes while flying by at high speed.
It prefers to battle by biting apart foes’ heads instantly while flying by at high speed.
It prefers to battle by biting apart foes’ heads instantly while flying by at high speed.
This six-legged Pokémon is easily capable of transporting an adult in flight. The wings on its tail help it stay balanced.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This six-legged Pokémon is easily capable of transporting an adult in flight. The wings on its tail help it stay balanced.

pokemon:yanma.name: Yanma
pokemon:yanma.summary: Yanma is capable of seeing 360 degrees without having to move its eyes. It is a great flier that is adept at making sudden stops and turning midair. This Pokémon uses its flying ability to quickly chase down targeted prey.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Yanma is capable of seeing 360 degrees without having to move its eyes. It is a great flier that is adept at making sudden stops and turning midair. This Pokémon uses its flying ability to quickly chase down targeted prey.
It can hover in one spot by flapping its wings at high speed. It flits about to guard its territory.
By flapping its wings at high speed, it can fly freely through the air. Even sudden stops are no problem.
It can see in all directions without moving its big eyes, helping it spot attackers and food right away.
Its eyes can see 360 degrees without moving its head. It won’t miss prey--even those behind it.
It can see 360 degrees without moving its eyes. It is a great flier capable of making sudden stops and turning midair to quickly chase down targeted prey.
Its large eyes can scan 360 degrees. It looks in all directions to seek out insects as its prey.
If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter win­ dows in the area.
If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter windows in the area.
If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter windows in the area.
Its frail wings are so thin that one can see clear through them. However, during flight these wings exhibit the power to churn air with force enough to launch a house skyward.

Yanma is capable of seeing 360 degrees without having to move its eyes. It is a great flier that is adept at making sudden stops and turning midair. This Pokémon uses its flying ability to quickly chase down targeted prey.
Its eyes can see 360 degrees without moving its head. It won’t miss prey--even those behind it.
It can hover in one spot by flapping its wings at high speed. It flits about to guard its territory.

YANMA is capable of seeing 360 degrees without having to move its eyes. It is a great flier that is adept at making sudden stops and turning midair. This POKéMON uses its flying ability to quickly chase down targeted prey.

YANMA is capable of seeing 360 degrees without having to move its eyes. It is a great flier that is adept at making sudden stops and turning midair. This POKéMON uses its flying ability to quickly chase down targeted prey.
Its large eyes can scan 360 degrees. It looks in all directions to seek out insects as its prey.
Its large eyes can scan 360 degrees. It looks in all directions to seek out insects as its prey.
It can hover in one spot by flapping its wings at high speed. It flits about to guard its territory.
By flapping its wings at high speed, it can fly freely through the air. Even sudden stops are no problem.
Its eyes can see 360 degrees without moving its head. It won’t miss prey--even those behind it.
If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter windows in the area.
